# Great Canadian Property Services

> Vancouver's premier property care provider. Expert pressure washing, window cleaning, exterior maintenance, and custom holiday lighting for the finest homes and commercial properties across the Lower Mainland of British Columbia.

Great Canadian Property Services is a fully insured and licensed exterior maintenance company based in Surrey, BC. We hold a 5.0-star rating on Google and serve 14 communities across Greater Vancouver, the Fraser Valley, and the Sea to Sky corridor. All assessments are complimentary and no-obligation.

## Services

### Residential

- [House Washing](/residential-pressure-washing/house-washing/) — Soft-wash removal of algae, mildew, and grime from siding, trim, and exterior surfaces.
- [Roof Cleaning](/residential-pressure-washing/roof-cleaning/) — Safe elimination of moss, lichen, algae, and gloeocapsa magma to extend shingle life.
- [Window Cleaning](/window-cleaning/) — Water-fed pole and traditional squeegee for spotless interior and exterior glass.
- [Driveway Cleaning](/residential-pressure-washing/driveway-cleaning/) — Removal of oil, tire rubber, organic stains, and embedded grime from concrete and asphalt.
- [Patio Cleaning](/residential-pressure-washing/patio-cleaning/) — Tailored care for stone, stamped concrete, pavers, and wood decking.
- [Concrete Cleaning](/residential-pressure-washing/concrete-cleaning/) — Professional stain and organic growth removal from walkways, porches, and poured surfaces.
- [Concrete & Paver Sanding](/residential-pressure-washing/concrete-paver-sanding/) — Joint sand restoration to stabilise pavers and deter weeds.
- [Concrete & Paver Sealing](/residential-pressure-washing/concrete-paver-sealing/) — Protective barrier against UV, moisture, staining, and organic growth.

### Commercial

- [Building Washing](/commercial-pressure-washing/building-washing/) — Soft-wash and pressure-wash care for office buildings, retail centres, and strata complexes.
- [Commercial Window Cleaning](/commercial-pressure-washing/window-cleaning/) — Recurring storefront and multi-storey glass programmes.
- [Fleet Washing](/commercial-pressure-washing/fleet-washing/) — Scheduled care for company vehicles, delivery trucks, and heavy equipment.
- [Gutter Cleaning](/commercial-pressure-washing/gutter-cleaning/) — Thorough clearing and exterior brightening to protect the building envelope.
- [Industrial Pressure Washing](/commercial-pressure-washing/industrial-pressure-washing/) — Heavy-duty cleaning for warehouses, loading docks, and manufacturing environments.

### Seasonal

- [Holiday Lighting](/christmas-lighting/) — Custom design, professional installation, maintenance, and removal of exterior Christmas and holiday lighting.

## Service Areas

Vancouver, Surrey (home base), North Vancouver, West Vancouver, Richmond, Coquitlam, Delta, Langley, White Rock, Maple Ridge, Abbotsford, Chilliwack, Squamish, Whistler

Full area pages: [/near-me/](/near-me/)
